task.title: Reduce repeated harness context on the frozen retry task without weakening verification

change_summary: Applied stable-prefix layout and tool-output projection to the agent harness, one policy at a time, against the pinned repository revision and unchanged acceptance test.

measurements.boundary: Deterministic fixture characters on TD-A-01-RETRY-001; provider tokens not measured.
Same fixture boundary; repetition counted across 14 tool calls.
No live provider run captured; field stays null rather than estimated.

verification.method: Frozen acceptance test via npm test (10 assertions) plus scripts/verify.mjs artifact and secret scan.

limitations: Character counts are a fixture proxy; provider token accounting remains unmeasured.
Single task, single revision; no evidence the policy generalizes across repositories.
safety_boundary: Synthetic fixture workload only; no customer data, credentials, or proprietary code involved.
